recommendations.title: The Revenant
recommendations.overview: In the 1820s, a frontiersman, Hugh Glass, sets out on a path of vengeance against those who left him for dead after a bear mauling.

recommendations.title: Birdman or (The Unexpected Virtue of Ignorance)

recommendations.title: The Notebook

recommendations.title: To Each His Own Cinema

recommendations.director: Raymond Depardon, Andrei Konchalovsky, Lars von Trier, Chen Kaige, Michael Cimino, Atom Egoyan, Wim Wenders, Manoel de Oliveira, Hou Hsiao-hsien, Jean-Pierre Dardenne, Jane Campion, Zhang Yimou, Ken Loach, Nanni Moretti, Elia Suleiman, Alejandro G. recommendations.title: My Mom Is a Character 3
recommendations.overview: Dona Hermínia will have to rediscover and reinvent herself because her children are forming new families. This supermom will have to deal with a new life scenario: Marcelina is pregnant and Juliano is getting married.

recommendations.title: Qué León
recommendations.overview: A love story between a couple with the same last name but very different social statuses.

recommendations.title: Breakthrough
recommendations.overview: Tragedy strikes when a woman named Joyce's son falls through the ice on a frozen lake and is trapped underwater for over 15 minutes. After being rushed to the hospital, the 14-year-old boy continues to fight for his life as Joyce, her husband and the

recommendations.title: Foxtrot
recommendations.overview: A troubled family must face facts when tragedy strikes their son's desolate military post.

recommendations.title: "Wuthering Heights"
recommendations.overview: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

recommendations.title: Sanam Teri Kasam
recommendations.overview: Tough ex-convict Inder and traditional mousy Saraswati fall in love and get married, but a tragedy changes their lives forever. The film is a modern rendition of the legends of Shiva-Sati and the novel "Love Story" by Eric Segal.
